kirundi.this_is_one_of_the_tricky_15_facts_the: Iyi ni imwe mu kuri 15 gukomeye — itsinda rito risaba kwiga ku mutwe vy'ukuri. Ja mu buryo bwo Kwitoza → «15 Bikomeye» kugira ngo uvyitoze.
kirundi.pick_a_pattern_to_highlight_the_table_: 🔍 Toranya ishusho yo kugaragaza. Imbonerahamwe yuzuyemo imiterere: igihe uyibonye, kimwe ca kabiri c'ukuri kiba gihanurwa.
kirundi.click_any_pattern_above_to_light_up_th: 👆 Fyonda ishusho iyo ari yo yose hejuru kugira ngo umurikire utuyobora kandi usome amategeko. Amashusho menshi ashobora kwisumbirana (urugero, 5×5 ni «umugwizo wa 5» kandi «kare yuzuye»).
kirundi.you_only_need_to_memorize_about_a_thir: Ukeneye kwiga ku mutwe gusa hafi kimwe ca gatatu c'imbonerahamwe.
kirundi.anything_in_the_1s_2s_5s_10s_11s_colum: Ikintu cose kiri mu nkingi za 1, 2, 5, 10 na 11 gifite itegeko ryoroshe. Kare ni itsinda rito (ukuri 12). Ibisigaye ni «hagati hakomeye» — hafi ukuri 15 — gusaba kwiga ku mutwe vy'ukuri: 6×7, 6×8, 6×9, 7×8, 7×9, 8×9 n'impanga zavyo.
kirundi.forget_7_8_7_8_5_8_2_8_40_16_56_build_: Wibagiwe 7×8? 7×8 = 5×8 + 2×8 = 40 + 16 = 56. Ubaka ukuri gukomeye uhereye ku vyoroshe bibiri. Nyuma yo gusubiramwo bihagije, igisubizo kiba cikora.
kirundi.visualizing_each_fact_as_an_area_model: Kwerekana buri kuri nk'urukiramende rw'icitegererezo c'ubuso (igika c'Ishusho) canke nk'ishusho (iki gika) bikuha inzira igana ku gisubizo itagomba kwibuka vyikoresha. Kwibuka kubakwa mu gihe, ariko ntibibaho gusa binyuze mu myitozo ya tekiniki.
kirundi.each_cell_a_multiplication_fact_color_: Buri kayanga = ukuri kumwe ko kugwiza. Ibara = ubuhanga bwawe kugeza ubu. Fyonda ku kayanga iyo ari ko kose kugira ngo witoze uko kuri.
kirundi.sliders_for_mastery_threshold_and_sele: Utugende tw'urwego rw'ubuhanga n'umubare-shingiro watoranyijwe. Igisubizo gitandukanye c'imimerere 3. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kirundi.hypothesis_how_does_threshold_change_f: Iciyumviro: urwego ruhindura gute impanuro ku banyeshure bahanganira?
kirundi.what_if_mastery_100_what_gets_praised: Bite nimba ubuhanga = 100%? Ni iki gishimirwa?
kirundi.explain_mastery_learning_thresholds: Sigura inzego z'kwiga gushingiye ku buhanga.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_3_state_mastery_m: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso c'ubuhanga gitandukanye c'imimerere 3; nta manota mabisi; nta guhishura — ku bushake.
